parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ agent_name: 'analytics', level: 'info', message: 'platform_snapshots written for ' + $('Build metrics payload').first().json.snapshot_date, metadata: { daily_digest: true, snapshot_date: $('Build metrics payload').first().json.snapshot_date, source_ok: $('Build metrics payload').first().json.metrics.data_quality.source_ok, source_missing: $('Build metrics payload').first().json.metrics.data_quality.source_missing, run_at: new Date().toISOString() } }]) }}
